name: Peoria Bell
description_short: Peoria Bell is a member-owned credit union serving the Peoria, Illinois area with NCUA insurance, online banking, and loan services for personal financial needs.
description_long: Peoria Bell Credit Union is a not-for-profit, member-owned financial institution based in Peoria, Illinois, with a physical location at 8103 N. University Street. Like all credit unions, it operates under NCUA (National Credit Union Administration) insurance rather than FDIC coverage, prioritizing member benefits over shareholder profits. The institution provides traditional credit union services including online banking access, loan applications, and ATM network access through their website. The website indicates they offer seasonal promotions (referenced as "Spring promotion") and maintain standard credit union resources including privacy notices and community reinvestment information. Their routing number (271187749) is publicly listed, facilitating electronic transfers and account setup. Peoria Bell distinguishes itself as a community-focused credit union serving the central Illinois region with personalized member service and local decision-making typical of smaller credit unions. However, the website provides minimal detail about specific products, rates, loan types, or membership requirements, making it difficult to assess competitive advantages or full service offerings. The organization appears to maintain a basic web presence focused on directing members to online banking and loan applications rather than providing comprehensive product information.
pros: NCUA-insured member deposits, offering equivalent consumer protection to FDIC-insured banks
Online banking available for convenient account access and management
Physical branch location in Peoria with direct phone support (309-692-8257)
Loan application services available through website
Community reinvestment program indicating local lending focus
Routing number publicly available for easy fund transfers
cons: Website provides minimal information about specific loan products, rates, terms, or membership eligibility requirements
No details on savings account types, share certificates, or dividend rates
Limited geographic reach as a single-location community credit union may restrict accessibility for non-local members
Website lacks competitive rate comparison or product feature details to help consumers evaluate membership value
No information about credit builder loans, PALs (Payday Alternative Loans), or other member-focused products
best_for: Peoria, Illinois residents and employees seeking community-focused banking with local decision-making
Individuals already embedded in the local community who qualify for membership
Members prioritizing NCUA insurance and credit union ownership model over traditional banking
diagnosis: Peoria Bell Credit Union is best suited for Peoria-area residents seeking traditional credit union membership with NCUA protection and local service. The primary caveat is the extremely limited online information about specific products, rates, and services—prospective members must contact the credit union directly or visit in person to understand full offerings and eligibility.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Peoria Bell — Credit Union in Peoria, IL | CreditDoc
meta_description: Peoria Bell — NCUA-insured credit union in Peoria, IL. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
